text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands at the Yasuda Kinen are absolutely
packed—mostly with Oguri Cap fans, it seems.
The enthusiasm around her has grown so massive
that you could call her a cultural icon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in the paddock, Oguri Cap's popularity feels
oppressive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, Yaeno Muteki is determined to win the
crowd over. Her race against Oguri Cap is about
to begin!
